content: We can reframe the generic agent of Topic B as a dynamic "episodic curiosity filter" for the neural architecture episodic planning agent of Topic A, where the generic agent's core role is to prune low-curiosity irrelevant past episodes from the planning agent's memory before long-horizon planning. This filter adaptively retains only episodes that trigger intrinsic curiosity (measured via ICM or RND prediction error) to reduce memory bloat and speed up planning convergence.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
